description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a combination of light blue and white panels, with a prominent white toe box perforated for breathability. The upper is constructed from what appears to be synthetic leather and textile, with a padded collar and tongue for comfort. The shoe has a classic lace-up closure with white laces threaded through reinforced eyelets. The side panels display a faint swoosh design, and there is a textured patch near the ankle area, possibly indicating branding. The midsole is white and slightly raised, while the outsole is flat and designed for urban surfaces. The overall build suggests durability and support, suitable for everyday wear in urban environments.
description: A high-top sneaker in light blue and white with a lace-up front, padded collar, and subtle branding details. The shoe features a perforated toe box and a flat, durable sole.
description_view_0: Front view shows the white perforated toe box, white laces, and padded tongue.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the swoosh design, blue and white color blocking, and ankle patch.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the padded heel collar and heel seam, with minimal detailing.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the swoosh and color pattern, with laces visible.
